---
title: "Maddie Cunningham"
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: "IMG_6195.jpg"
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  image-alt: "Otis the dog"
format: 
  html:
    theme: flatly
---

My name is Maddie Cunningham and I am a Research Associate with the San Diego Zoo Wildlife Alliance. I currently work with an endangered species and I focus on how anthropogenic activity affect water quality and the surrounding ecosystem.

I am a rescue certified diver, AAUS certified diver and have experiences with both fresh and salt water habitats. I also have my Wilderness First Aid Certification and keep up to date on other basic certificates like CPR.

When I am not doing science things, I like working out, being outside, taking naps and playing hide and go seek with my dog, Otis!
